category_sources: source_facts.description says this is X.Org font package creation/installation utilities.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official X.Org site; used as the best official documentation surface available from input.
repo_sources: source_facts.source-archive is hosted under the official X.Org font archive; X.Org projects are maintained on freedesktop.org GitLab.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies font package utilities for X.Org; source_facts.executables lists command-line tools.
